updates.title: Professional documents + auto-update
updates.notes: Documents got a big upgrade: your business logo now appears on every PDF, invoices/quotes/receipts use a polished violet letterhead theme, and documents are stamped (PAID, OVERDUE, DRAFT, QUOTE, VALID). New: per-customer statements, a product price list, and a print preview before printing. Set your logo and SMTP email under Settings. The app now checks for updates automatically.
